overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a sunlit coastal shanty town. The player traverses apartment-lined streets, enters a building, and emerges into an overgrown settlement with a roller coaster in the background, eventually engaging in melee combat near a bonfire.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the street between apartment buildings toward the distant roller coaster

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with balconies and graffiti
weathered apartment block with large wall murals
large red metal roller coaster framework visible in the distance
tall modern street lamp with dual orange fixtures
discarded gray sofa on the sidewalk
rusted military-style truck parked in the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a sunlit urban street flanked by apartment buildings. An abandoned sofa and truck are visible along the path, while a large roller coaster structure dominates the distant horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment building entrance and balcony walkway

events.description: approaches building entrance and begins ascending metal stairs
exits balcony and descends back to ground level entering shanty area

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to a balcony, briefly entering a shaded interior space, then exiting to overlook the shanty town

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt standing by the entrance door looking at his phone

entered.detail: doorway with concrete stairs leading upward
exterior staircase with metal railings
metal door with push bar at the top of the stairs
external AC unit mounted on the building wall
metal safety railing along the elevated walkway
makeshift buildings and shacks visible from the balcony

segments.scene_description: The player enters an apartment building, ascends the stairs to a balcony, and exits to a view overlooking a shanty settlement. An NPC stands by the entrance as the player transitions from the street to the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown coastal shanty settlement with scattered structures

events.description: exits building balcony and enters open shanty town area with dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking through overgrown paths between makeshift shacks and palm trees toward the beachfront

entered.detail: wooden shacks and makeshift dwellings with corrugated metal roofs
tall palm trees scattered throughout the settlement
sandy dirt path with patches of dry grass
metal barrels and discarded containers near shacks
open area with visible smoke and fire becoming apparent

segments.scene_description: The player explores an overgrown shanty settlement with dirt paths and palm trees. Makeshift structures line the route as the player approaches a bonfire area with the roller coaster structure visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bonfire gathering area with scattered debris

events.description: player engages in melee combat with multiple enemies near the bonfire

agents.ego_description: approaching a group near a bonfire then engaging in hand-to-hand combat with melee weapons

notable_agents.action: enemy combatant attacking with a melee weapon near the fire
second enemy approaching from the left side of the bonfire

entered.detail: active fire with rising smoke in the center of the gathering area
abandoned red couch near the bonfire
dark smoke rising from the bonfire

segments.scene_description: The player enters an open area with an active bonfire surrounded by debris and abandoned furniture. The player engages in melee combat with multiple enemies near the fire while the roller coaster structure remains visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit urban street into the heart of a chaotic, overgrown shanty settlement. It begins by moving past apartment buildings and abandoned debris along a bright road, with a massive roller coaster structure looming on the distant horizon. As the camera enters a building and ascends a staircase, the perspective shifts from the street level to an elevated balcony overlooking a makeshift community. The scene then expands into a settlement of dirt paths and palm trees, weaving through makeshift structures before turning toward a central clearing. Finally, the movement culminates in an open area filled with debris and an active bonfire, where the camera engages in melee combat with enemies while the roller coaster remains visible to the left.
